# Glue library: a single generated TU that references the link anchor of every package
# that opted in via KRG_ar_package(included = true). The engine links this lib and calls
# kryga::glue::link_all_packages() once, which drags those packages' static registration
# (game_mode + reflected types) into the program. This replaces per-package /WHOLEARCHIVE
# and is portable (plain symbol references, no MSVC-only linker flags).
#
# The source is generated by argen's --type bind pass (top-level CMakeLists, configure
# time, before this subdirectory). A stub is written here if it does not exist yet so a
# brand-new build tree still configures.
set(_glue_gen_dir "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/kryga_generated/packages/glue")
set(_glue_gen_src "${_glue_gen_dir}/private/src/glue_link.ar.cpp")
set(_glue_gen_hdr "${_glue_gen_dir}/public/include/glue/glue_link.ar.h")

if(NOT EXISTS "${_glue_gen_src}")
    file(MAKE_DIRECTORY "${_glue_gen_dir}/private/src")
    file(WRITE "${_glue_gen_src}"
        "#include \"glue/glue_link.ar.h\"\nnamespace kryga::glue { int link_all_packages() { return 0; } }\n")
endif()
if(NOT EXISTS "${_glue_gen_hdr}")
    file(MAKE_DIRECTORY "${_glue_gen_dir}/public/include/glue")
    file(WRITE "${_glue_gen_hdr}"
        "#pragma once\nnamespace kryga::glue { int link_all_packages(); }\n")
endif()

add_library(glue STATIC "${_glue_gen_src}")

target_include_directories(glue PUBLIC "${_glue_gen_dir}/public/include")

add_library(kryga::glue ALIAS glue)
